products.title: ThreatScope
products.tagline: 1-Page Competitor Threat Analysis for Local Businesses
products.description: Scrape Google Maps for a target business plus its top 3 local competitors. Pull recent reviews, current promotions, and social posts. AI generates a customized 1-page Threat Analysis showing exactly what competitors are doing better — plus a counter-strategy. Cold email delivers the report as the hook.
products.subject_line: I ran an automated analysis on your top 3 competitors.
products.why_works: A named competitor's named promo and named new reviews — quantified and on the prospect's desk before they even reply.

products.title: LeakyFunnel
products.description: Scrape e-commerce and local service sites. Run automated speed tests and check for missing tracking pixels (Meta/Google remarketing). AI calculates lost revenue from slow load times and missing pixels — delivered as a personalized 'Lost Revenue Report' in the cold email.
products.subject_line: Your site loads in 6s. You're leaving 20% of revenue on the table.
products.why_works: A 6-second load + missing remarketing pixel = ~20% lost revenue. Industry averages anchor the number. The owner cannot ignore it.

products.title: InstantSOP
products.tagline: Public Documentation → Private AI Knowledge Base
products.description: Scrape job boards for companies hiring multiple roles, OR scrape a target's Help Center, blog, and YouTube transcripts. Feed everything into a private AI chatbot — instantly creating a 'Company Knowledge Base.' Cold email delivers a working AI Assistant trained on the prospect's own data.
products.subject_line: I built an AI Assistant trained on your company. Try it.
wins: Demo = working AI on their data
Clear use case for hiring teams
before_bullets: Hours of manager time per hire
after_bullets: Private chatbot trained on their docs
products.why_works: We scraped your public docs and built an internal AI Assistant for your team. The cold email IS a working demo of their company's AI.
